stage_H_reason: held-out likelihood is IDENTICAL across all 30 random sign-value bijections (range < 1e-9) — internal evidence is value-blind (relabeling-invariant), so an agnostic internal search cannot rank value maps or exceed the null.

stage_J_end_to_end_null.only_ranker: external-anchor fit — Stage F: no >=3-independent held-out non-circular anchors; existing pins one-toponym-deep, LOTO-fragile (two frozen preregistered REFUTEs)
stage_J_end_to_end_null.verdict: no agnostic system beats the end-to-end null; apparent systems are one-deep noise

note: No unbounded root/language search was run (forbidden). The null is PROVABLE from relabeling-invariance; this script confirms it empirically.
